detail.description:
Join Talking Tom, Angela, Hank, Ginger, Ben, and Becca in the most exciting virtual pet adventure! Dive into a world of cool animals and endless fun! Visit their house and see why they are the ultimate pet friends!

Here's why you'll love playing with them:

- Take Care of All Six Friends: Interact with your favorite characters in one house! Feed, bathe, dress, and put them to sleep. Talk, play, and engage with Tom, Angela, Hank, Ginger, Ben, and Becca. Each character has their unique personalit
detail.recentChanges: Bug fixes and minor gameplay improvements.
